summary: Sprint goal delivered. PR #1147 (--no-sqlite + AGENTGUARD_GO_TIMEOUT) and PR #1152 (storage migration regression) both merged. P0 swarm blocker (#1128) root cause resolved. New PRs: #1168 (graceful SQLite fallback, closes #1148) is CI-green and ready for architect review; #1153 (strip heredoc bodies, closes #1119) has a test-and-build failure — needs rebase onto main (was filed against old base before #1147/#1152 landed). No escalation triggers met. Next sprint: merge #1168, rebase+merge #1153, assign #1139 (date false-positive) to senior, begin #955 (Go kernel delegation).

prs.title: fix(guard): graceful SQLite fallback when native bindings unavailable
prs.note: All 5 CI checks green (lint, test-and-build, CodeQL, rust-kernel, analyze). No reviews yet — flag for architect.

prs.title: fix(matchers): strip heredoc bodies before destructive pattern scanning
prs.note: test-and-build failed — filed against old base (pre-#1147/#1152). Needs rebase onto main. Lint, CodeQL, rust-kernel all pass.

mergedThisCycle.title: fix: --no-sqlite guard flag + AGENTGUARD_GO_TIMEOUT for CI stability
mergedThisCycle.note: Merged 2026-03-27T23:09Z. All CI green. Resolved P0 swarm SQLite startup blocker.

mergedThisCycle.title: fix(storage): update v5 migration test to expect 2 applied migrations after v6 added
mergedThisCycle.note: Merged 2026-03-28T02:34Z. Regression fix for test introduced by #1098 (migration v6). Storage: 243/243 passing.

openP1Issues.title: Destructive detection fires on heredoc/report content
openP1Issues.note: PR #1153 implements fix. Needs rebase + CI green before merge.

openP1Issues.title: SQLite native bindings fail in worktrees (graceful fallback)

openP1Issues.title: $(date ...) blocked as dangerous shell expansion (command scanner over-matches)
openP1Issues.note: Command scanner incorrectly flags read-only shell expansions like $(date +%Y-%m-%d). Assign to senior coder next cycle.
